v7:
SUMMARY:
This PR adds metadata (description in pom.xml and quarkus-extension.yaml) for the SSE and stdio transport extensions so they display correctly in code.quarkus.io and Maven Central. Overall straightforward, but there is a typo and a few consistency questions to address.

POINTS:
- [transports/stdio/pom.xml:14] Typo in description: "stanard input/output" should be "**standard** input/output".
- [transports/sse/runtime/src/main/resources/META-INF/quarkus-extension.yaml:1] The existing `core/runtime/src/main/resources/META-INF/quarkus-extension.yaml` includes a top-level `description` field ("This extension enables developers to implement the MCP server features easily."). The new SSE and stdio YAML files do not. Should these also include a `description` field for consistency?
- [transports/sse/runtime/src/main/resources/META-INF/quarkus-extension.yaml:5] The guide URL in the new files is `https://docs.quarkiverse.io/quarkus-mcp-server/dev/index.html`, but the existing core extension has a commented-out guide URL of `https://docs.quarkiverse.io/mcp-server/dev/` (note: different path structure and commented vs uncommented). Please confirm the guide URL is correct and whether the core extension's guide should be updated to match or uncommented for consistency.
v8:
SUMMARY:
This PR adds missing extension metadata (pom descriptions and quarkus-extension.yaml files) for the SSE and stdio transport extensions. The structure aligns with existing conventions, but there is a typo and a missing field in the yaml files.

POINTS:
- [transports/stdio/pom.xml] Typo in the description: "stanard input/output" should be "standard input/output".
- [transports/sse/runtime/src/main/resources/META-INF/quarkus-extension.yaml] Missing `description` field. The existing core extension (`core/runtime/src/main/resources/META-INF/quarkus-extension.yaml`) includes a `description` line ("This extension enables developers to implement the MCP server features easily."). Consider adding one here (e.g., "This extension enables developers to implement the MCP server features easily using server side events (SSE).") for consistency.
- [transports/stdio/runtime/src/main/resources/META-INF/quarkus-extension.yaml] Same as above — missing `description` field that the core extension has. Consider adding one for consistency.
- [core/runtime/src/main/resources/META-INF/quarkus-extension.yaml] (Nit / out of scope) The guide URL here is commented out and uses the incorrect path `mcp-server/dev/` instead of `quarkus-mcp-server/dev/`. The new files in this PR use the correct URL — you may want to uncomment and fix the core extension's guide URL in a follow-up.
